title: City Names William Sullivan to Parks Trails Coordinator
summary: The City of Syracuse appointed William Sullivan as Parks Trails Coordinator, effective May 2026. Sullivan will manage maintenance and revitalization of city trails including the Onondaga Creekwalk and Empire State Trail. He brings prior experience as a Regional Trails Coordinator for NYS Parks and as a Wastewater Treatment Plant Operator, plus environmental biology credentials.
department_refs: Department of Parks, Recreation & Youth Programs

entity_refs.name: New York State Office of Parks, Recreation and Historic Preservation
Onondaga County Department of Water Environment Protection

political_signal.description: New hire signals commitment to trail infrastructure maintenance and modernization as a departmental priority under Parks Commissioner leadership.
